priority_scoring_path: claude-llm: ANR with 100% reproducibility on Android 14, ~30% of Android base affected, no graceful fallback exists, VTO is a key differentiator but not checkout/payment path
severity_justification: ANR on Android 14 blocks Virtual Try-On for ~30% of the Android user base with 100% reproducibility and no graceful fallback, causing significant feature degradation and Play Store rating impact. However, this affects only the Immersive/VTO feature path — checkout, payment, and core shopping flows are unaffected, so it does not meet the P0 bar of a full outage or revenue-blocking crash. Similar historical bugs (FLIPPI-2458, FLIPPI-2939) were filed as P0 but those appear to be broader VTON data/DAO issues; the ANR here is scoped to Android 14 users of one feature.
owner_reason: Shreya Choudhary is the assignee on three of the top five VTON-related matches (FLIPPI-2458, FLIPPI-2939, FLIPPI-2878) and is the primary owner of P0 VTON SDK issues in this project.
